meta.system: Nova Microfinance – Helaplus / Mifos X Clone
meta.description: Consolidated issues register mapped to Mifos/Fineract codebase components

issues.title: Top-Up Loan Logic Error – Deducts Principal AND Future Interest
issues.description: When processing top-up loan, system deducts BOTH outstanding principal AND outstanding interest for remaining period instead of principal only. Creates artificial debt on new loan.
issues.businessImpact: Incorrect loan balances; client disputes; portfolio distortion; interest income projection errors
issues.rootCause: Top-up computation logic includes future interest in offset calculation. Confirmed on client Lubega Kenneth.
issues.suggestedFix: Adjust top-up logic: offset only outstanding principal. Use getLoanSummary().getPrincipalOutstanding() not getTotalOutstanding(). Reverse affected cases.

issues.title: Boda Repossession Module Missing – 22 Active bikes should be Repossessed
issues.description: No module for Active→Repossessed bucket transfer. 22 repossessed bikes still showing as Active, causing arrears escalation.
issues.businessImpact: PAR distortion (22 cases); incorrect arrears; misleading portfolio reports
issues.rootCause: No loan status bucket for Repossessed. Fortune has similar setup (per Zayyad).
issues.suggestedFix: 1) Add REPOSSESSED status to LoanStatus enum. 2) Create RepossessLoanCommandHandler. 3) Configure accounting treatment (debit Repossessed Asset, credit NPL bucket). 4) Transfer 22 cases via batch job.

issues.title: Standing Instructions Auto-Pay Before Physical Deposit – Cash Flow Distortion
issues.description: Standing instructions auto-pay loans from savings BEFORE physical deposits are made. Trigger fires on book balance not confirmed deposits.
issues.businessImpact: Cash-flow distortion; operational confusion; audit risk; artificial repayments
issues.rootCause: Standing instruction trigger logic fires on book balance, not confirmed/cleared deposits.
issues.suggestedFix: Modify trigger logic: check deposit confirmation flag before executing. Add 'depositConfirmed' boolean on SavingsAccountTransaction. Disable auto-standing-instruction execution until deposit clears. Add config flag per product.

issues.title: Manual Disbursement Not Appearing in GL/Ledgers
issues.description: Manual disbursements not appearing in ledgers or accounting records. GL posting logic doesn't capture manual disbursement transactions.
issues.businessImpact: Accounting gaps; audit trail issues; unreconciled cash movements
issues.rootCause: GL posting logic bypassed for manual disbursement path.
issues.suggestedFix: Ensure disburseLoan() always calls postJournalEntries() regardless of manual/automated path. Add audit flag. Backfill missing GL entries for historical manual disbursements.

issues.title: Savings-to-Loan Offset Process Undefined – Wallet Fund Transfer
issues.description: No standard process for transferring wallet funds to clear loan balances. Cases: Anyayo Doreen, Adongo Winnie.
issues.businessImpact: Delayed closures; manual workarounds; inconsistent treatment; GL mismatches
issues.rootCause: No automated or documented workflow exists for wallet-to-loan offset.
issues.suggestedFix: Implement wallet-to-loan offset workflow: 1) Debit wallet savings account. 2) Credit loan account as repayment. 3) Post corresponding GL entries. 4) Add UI workflow in account-transfers. Define approval process.

issues.title: Loans Running That Should Be Frozen/Restructured
issues.description: Active loans that should have been frozen or restructured still running and accruing interest.
issues.businessImpact: Portfolio distortion; incorrect interest accrual; audit exposure
issues.rootCause: No freeze status mechanism in current configuration.
issues.suggestedFix: Leverage existing LoanInterestPauseApiResource. Add FROZEN status. Create batch identification job for loans meeting freeze criteria. Add UI control for authorized freeze action.

issues.title: All 3 Payment Action Buttons Fail – Undefined $loan Variable
issues.description: When processing repayments from uploaded MTN/Airtel/YO! statements, all payment buttons throw: 'Undefined variable: $loan in PaymentsController.php line 977'.
issues.businessImpact: Incomplete reconciliation workflow; all 3 providers unable to be reconciled through the HUB
issues.rootCause: Undefined $loan variable in processLoan() method called by replayUploadedPayments().
issues.suggestedFix: Initialize $loan = null before conditional block. Add null check before usage. Validate loan lookup returns valid object before calling processLoan(). Add error handling for missing loan reference.

issues.title: Airtel Withdraw Transaction Handling Missing in CSV Parser
issues.description: Airtel statements cannot upload if they contain withdraw transactions. MTN auto-excludes these but Airtel parser does not.
issues.businessImpact: Manual CSV cleanup required before each upload; error-prone process
issues.rootCause: Airtel CSV parser missing transaction type filter logic that MTN parser has.
issues.suggestedFix: Copy MTN parser's transaction type exclusion logic into Airtel parser. Filter rows where transaction_type == 'WITHDRAW' or equivalent Airtel field. Add unit test for both parsers.

issues.title: Airtel Date Parsing Error – Future Dates Appearing
issues.description: Future dates appearing in uploaded Airtel statements (e.g., Nov 2026 for current transactions). Date format mismatch.
issues.businessImpact: Incorrect reconciliation timing; delayed payment matching
issues.rootCause: Date format mismatch between Airtel CSV format and HUB parser expectations.
issues.suggestedFix: Identify Airtel date format (likely DD/MM/YYYY vs MM/DD/YYYY or YY vs YYYY). Fix date parsing regex/format string. Add validation: reject dates > today + 1 day.

issues.title: YO! Uganda CSV Upload Completely Fails
issues.description: YO! Uganda statements completely fail to upload. Parser cannot handle YO! CSV format.
issues.rootCause: YO! CSV format structure totally differs from MTN/Airtel. No parser exists.
issues.suggestedFix: 1) Obtain YO! CSV sample format. 2) Implement YoUgandaCsvParser class. 3) Map columns: reference_no, amount, phone, date, type. 4) Register parser in ParserFactory. 5) Add tests.

issues.title: USSD Down Payment Misrouting to Existing Loans
issues.description: Down payments made via USSD for NEW loans being applied to EXISTING loans instead of new loan setup.
issues.businessImpact: Cross-account errors; client disputes; incorrect loan setup
issues.rootCause: Payment routing logic not distinguishing new loan down payments from existing loan repayments.
issues.suggestedFix: Add payment_intent flag to USSD payload: 'down_payment' vs 'repayment'. Route based on flag + loan status check. If loan in APPROVED state, treat as down payment. If ACTIVE, treat as repayment.

issues.title: Client Office Transfer Fails When transferDate Passed
issues.description: POST /api/v1/clients/{clientId}?command=transfer fails if transferDate is passed. Error: 'transferDate not supported'.
issues.businessImpact: Cannot schedule client transfers; system-dated only
issues.rootCause: Endpoint enforces system-dated transfers; no user-defined dates allowed.

apiSample.note: Remove transferDate from payload – system auto-dates transfer

issues.suggestedFix: Remove transferDate from payload OR update ClientWritePlatformServiceJpaRepositoryImpl to accept optional transferDate parameter with validation.

issues.title: Product Accounting Mapping Fails – productToAccountMapping.not.found
issues.description: System throws 'productToAccountMapping.not.found' despite all GL fields filled. Affects ALL HAOJUE, TVS, HONDA products.
issues.businessImpact: Blocks product configuration for multiple boda products
issues.rootCause: Missing/inactive GL accounts, Cash vs Accrual mismatch, or incomplete mapping payload.
issues.suggestedFix: 1) Confirm accounting rule (Cash vs Accrual). 2) Verify all listed GL accounts are ACTIVE. 3) Check all 8 required mappings are present. 4) Review backend validation in LoanProductAccountingDataValidator.

issues.title: Aging Reports – No Date Range or 'As Of' Date Selection
issues.description: Cannot select date range or 'as of' date for aging reports. Cannot view historical aging positions.
issues.businessImpact: Limited analysis capability; no historical trend view

relevantClasses: Report SQL query – add WHERE clause for date parameter

issues.suggestedFix: Add 'asOfDate' and optional 'fromDate' parameters to aging report SQL. Update ReportingProcessService to accept date parameters. Add date picker to report UI.

issues.title: Aging Summary Returns Blank Output
issues.description: Aging Summary report returns blank/empty output. Key management report completely non-functional.
issues.rootCause: Missing data aggregation in query logic or missing required parameter.
issues.suggestedFix: 1) Test report SQL directly against DB. 2) Check if required parameters are populated. 3) Verify data aggregation GROUP BY clauses. 4) Add PRPT debug logging.

issues.title: No Portfolio Historical View / Point-in-Time Snapshot
issues.description: Cannot view portfolio position as of selected historical date. No trend analysis capability.
issues.businessImpact: Blind spot for management; no trend analysis
issues.suggestedFix: Implement point-in-time portfolio snapshot using LoanTransaction history. Query loan balances as of asOfDate from LoanRepaymentScheduleInstallment. Build portfolio snapshot API endpoint.

issues.title: Repayment Schedule Not Downloadable with Merchant Code & Brand Header
issues.description: Users cannot download repayment plans that include merchant codes and Nova branded header.
issues.businessImpact: Client-facing documents lack branding; manual workaround required
issues.suggestedFix: 1) Update PRPT template to include Nova header/logo and merchant code field. 2) Pass merchant_code as parameter from loan product config. 3) Add download button to repayment-schedule-tab component.

systemicPatterns: No proper wallet accounting model – GL not linked to wallet operations
No central data warehouse – Metabase connected directly to operational DB
Manual intervention dependency – Loan officers using sheets outside system
Weak feedback loops – Credit analyst notes not reaching loan officers
GL mapping not formally audited – MF-002 pattern repeated across products
No loan lifecycle freeze mechanism – Loans running without control
Over-reliance on operational memory vs documented process
HUB CSV parsers inconsistent – each provider has different quality implementation
No reconciliation dashboard – collections vs disbursements vs GL alignment blind
